# PERF-230 positive: pure helper re-evaluated with stable args in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-230-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func parseProps(props string) int {
	return len(props)
}

func DrawCells(cells []string, props string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, cell := range cells {
		// props is loop-invariant; re-parsing every cell is wasteful.
		w := parseProps(props)
		total += w + len(cell)
	}
	return total
}
